member.name: T:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Public authentication endpoints — no tenant context required.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(DoctorLicenseManagement.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Registers a new tenant (workspace) with an initial admin user and subscription. This is the full SaaS onboarding in one request: User info + workspace name + subdomain + plan selection.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(DoctorLicenseManagement.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user within a specific tenant workspace. Returns a JWT access token with tenant and role claims.

member.name: T:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController
member.summary: Doctor License Management — CRUD endpoints. All endpoints require a valid JWT and resolved tenant context. Write operations (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) require Admin role.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetAll(System.String,System.Nullable{DoctorLicenseManagement.Domain.Enums.DoctorStatus},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of doctors. Uses the sp_GetDoctors stored procedure internally. Expiry logic and search/filter are handled by the SQL stored procedure.
member.param: Search by full name or license number (optional).

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single doctor by ID. Expiry logic is applied in C# (EffectiveStatus).

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.Create(DoctorLicenseManagement.Application.DTOs.CreateDoctorDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new doctor. License Number must be unique among non-deleted records. Requires Admin role. Enforces plan doctor-count limits.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.Update(System.Guid,DoctorLicenseManagement.Application.DTOs.UpdateDoctorDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Replaces all editable fields of an existing doctor. Requires Admin role. License Number uniqueness is enforced (excluding this doctor).

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,DoctorLicenseManagement.Application.DTOs.UpdateStatusDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates only the status of a doctor (Active / Expired / Suspended).

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.Delete(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a doctor. The record is retained in the database with IsDeleted = true and will not appear in any listing query.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.DoctorsController.GetExpired(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: (Bonus) Returns all doctors with an expired license. Uses sp_GetExpiredDoctors stored procedure.

member.name: T:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.PlansController
member.summary: Public endpoint — returns available subscription plans for the pricing/signup page. No authentication or tenant context required.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.PlansController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all active subscription plans ordered by display order.

member.name: M:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Controllers.PlansController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single plan by ID.

member.name: T:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Middleware.GlobalExceptionMiddleware
member.summary: Catches all unhandled exceptions and returns a consistent RFC 7807 ProblemDetails response. This prevents stack traces leaking to clients in production while still logging full detail.

member.name: T:DoctorLicenseManagement.API.Middleware.TenantResolutionMiddleware
member.summary:
Resolves the current tenant from the incoming HTTP request and populates ICurrentTenantService.
Resolution order: 1. X-Tenant-Subdomain header (easy for Postman / direct API testing) 2. Host subdomain (production: acme.app.com → "acme")
Endpoints that do NOT require a tenant context (auth/register, plans, swagger) set [AllowWithoutTenant] or are excluded by path prefix matching below.
